name: Oatmeal Pancakes (Rice)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup + 2 tablespoons uncooked oatmeal, or half oatmeal and half wheat germ
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender or food processor and blend for 5-6 seconds.
2. Drop the batter by spoonfuls into a hot greased frying pan.
3. Turn pancakes when bubbles appear on the surface, and cook for an additional minute.
4. Serve with ham, fruit preserves, fresh berries, or other fruit.
Makes four 4-inch pancakes.
Nutrients: calories 229, protein 14.5 grams, fat 14.8 grams, cholesterol 221 mg, fiber 1.1 grams, sodium 408 mg.
